---
title: Coney Island
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549191/coneyisland_yume5e.jpg
description: Coney Island, cours aquarelle savoir dessiner
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2023/08/15
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549191/coneyisland_yume5e.jpg)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
